metadata.description: Tools and implements for processing, preserving, and collecting food
metadata.cultural_focus: Food preparation tools that embody cooperative values through traditional techniques, sustainable practices, and community-centered food processing

concepts.concept_description: heavy stone tool for crushing grains and seeds into flour
concepts.cultural_meaning: represents human-powered food processing over industrial machinery, maintaining community control over food preparation

concepts.concept_description: wooden frame for air-drying fruits, vegetables, and meat for preservation
concepts.cultural_meaning: enables food preservation through natural air and sun power, extending seasonal abundance without artificial energy or chemicals

concepts.concept_description: woven container for collecting wild foods and garden produce
concepts.cultural_meaning: enables sustainable foraging and harvesting through traditional weaving skills, connecting food gathering with community craft knowledge
